category_sources: source_facts.description identifies Geeqie as a lightweight GTK-based image viewer.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name identifies geeqie; official homepage uses the display name Geeqie.
docs_sources: Official Geeqie homepage links to the manual; official manual page is titled The Geeqie User Manual.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/BestImageViewer/geeqie, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description states it is a GTK-based image viewer; official Geeqie homepage describes image organizing, metadata, color management, and fast preview features.
